mapping_description: pvenketa : 06/11/2014 Modifying the mapping to add 2 entity into W table

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
SCXMABB.BOM_REF_ID, 
COALESCE(SCXMABB.BOM_PARENT_REF_ID,'-1'), 
SCXMABB.PO_NUMBER, 
SCXMABB.SO_NUMBER, 
SCXMABB.SO_LINE_NUMBER, 
SCXMABB.SO_MAJOR_LINE_NUMBER, 
SCXMABB.CISCO_DUNS, 
SCXMABB.PARTNER_DUNS, 
SCXMABB.BOM_ITEM_QUANTITY, 
SCXMABB.UOM, 
SCXMABB.ITEM_TYPE, 
SCXMABB.ITEM_NUMBER, 
SCXMABB.ORG_CODE, 
SCXMABB.ITEM_REVISION, 
SCXMABB.ITEM_PRICE, 
SCXMABB.CURRENCY_CODE, 
SCXMABB.PLANNING_CODE, 
SCXMABB.TRANSMISSION_DATE, 
SCXMABB.PROCESS_STATUS, 
SCXMABB.BOM_PROCESS_FLAG, 
SCXMABB.BOM_PROCESS_STATUS, 
SCXMABB.CREATION_DATE, 
SCXMABB.CREATED_BY, 
SCXMABB.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, 
SCXMABB.LAST_UPDATED_BY, 
SCXMABB.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, 
SCXMABB.REQUEST_ID, 
SCXMABB.FLB_COST, 
SCXMABB.MESSAGE_BOM_PACK_ID, 
SCXMABB.GES_UPDATE_DATE, 
SCXMABB.GLOBAL_NAME, 
SCXMABB.DF_FEE_COST,
SCXMABB.BATCH_ID, 
SCXMABB.CREATE_DATETIME,
SCXMABB.ACTION_CODE ,
'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE,
SCXMABB.ATTRIBUTE6
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_CG1_XXSCM_MK_AS_BILT_BOM SCXMABB
WHERE 
NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIO,
                                $$COMREFVWDB.N_INVENTORY_ITEM NIIT
                WHERE   SCXMABB.ORG_CODE = NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_CODE
                AND  SCXMABB.ITEM_NUMBER = NIIT.BK_PRODUCT_ID
                AND NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY = NIIT.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY)
OR NOT EXISTS
 ( SELECT 1 FROM (  SELECT BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT,PRODUCT_KEY  , MIN(SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY) SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE
                FROM  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE  
                WHERE MAJOR_LINE_TYPE    ='MAJOR' 
                AND ITEM_TYPE_CODE  IN ('STANDARD','MODEL')
                GROUP BY BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT,PRODUCT_KEY,BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE) NSOL,$$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIO
                WHERE  NSOL.BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT=SCXMABB.SO_LINE_NUMBER
                AND  CAST(NSOL.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT AS BIGINT)=CAST(SCXMABB.SO_NUMBER AS BIGINT)
				AND NSOL.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE=NCIO.BK_INVENTORY_ORG_NAME_CODE
				AND SCXMABB.ORG_CODE = NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_CODE
)
OR NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM  ( SELECT BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM , MIN( PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY) PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY
                                FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER 
                                WHERE SS_CD ='CG'
                                GROUP BY BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM  ) NPO
              WHERE  SCXMABB.PO_NUMBER = NPO.BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM 	  )

SELECT 
SM.AS_BUILT_BOM_PRODUCT_LINK_KEY AS AS_BUILT_BOM_PRODUCT_LINK_KEY,
COALESCE(NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,-7777) AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
COALESCE(NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY,-999)  AS INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY,
COALESCE(NSOL.PRODUCT_KEY ,-997) AS PRODUCT_KEY,
COALESCE(NIIT.ITEM_KEY, -997) AS CONSTITUENT_PART_KEY,
COALESCE(ELC.CARTON_ID,'UNKNOWN')  AS CARTON_ID,
SBOM.MESSAGE_BOM_PACK_ID AS EP_MESSAGE_BOM_PACK_ID,
SBOM.BOM_REF_ID AS EP_BOM_REF_ID,
COALESCE(SBOM.BOM_PARENT_REF_ID,'-1') AS EP_BOM_PARENT_REF_ID,
COALESCE(SBOM.PLANNING_CODE,'UNKNOWN') AS PLANNING_CD,
COALESCE(SBOM.TRANSMISSION_DATE , TIMESTAMP '3500-01-01 00:00:00' ) AS BOM_INFRMTN_TRANSMISSION_DTM,
COALESCE(SBOM.CREATION_DATE, TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:01:01' ) AS CREATE_DTM,
SBOM.FLB_COST AS CNSTNT_PART_UNIT_COST_USD_AMT,
COALESCE(SBOM.BOM_ITEM_QUANTITY,0) AS CONSTITUENT_PART_QTY,
COALESCE(SBOM.PO_NUMBER,'UNKNOWN') AS SRC_RPRTD_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM,
COALESCE(NPO.PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY,-99995) AS PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY,
COALESCE(SBOM.ITEM_TYPE,'UNKNOWN') AS AS_BUILT_PRODUCT_ITEM_TYPE_CD,
COALESCE(SBOM.ITEM_REVISION,'UNK') AS AS_BLT_CNSTNT_PART_ITEM_REV_CD,
COALESCE(SBOM.BOM_PROCESS_STATUS,'UNKNOWN') AS BOM_PROCESS_STATUS_CD,
COALESCE(SBOM.PROCESS_STATUS,'UNKNOWN') AS  PROCESS_STATUS_CD,
SBOM.DF_FEE_COST AS DF_FEE_USD_COST,
COALESCE(WRUC.RU_COST  ,0) AS  DV_ROLLUP_USD_COST ,
'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
'I' AS DML_TYPE,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE as LAST_UPDATE_DTM,
cast(LAST_UPDATE_DATE as date) as DV_LAST_UPDATE_DT,
/*(CASE WHEN NABBPL.AS_BUILT_BOM_PRODUCT_LINK_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN 'U' ELSE 'I' END) AS DML_TYPE*/
/* :pvenketa added as part of Q3FY15 by SC-LSS */
CAST(CAST(CAST( CAST( SBOM.ATTRIBUTE6 AS TIMESTAMP FORMAT 'MM/DD/YYYYBHH:MI:SSBT')  AS TIMESTAMP FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DDBHH:MI:SS') AS VARCHAR(19)) AS TIMESTAMP(0))AS COST_ROLLUP_DTM,
CAST( CAST( SBOM.ATTRIBUTE6 AS TIMESTAMP  FORMAT 'MM/DD/YYYYBHH:MI:SSBT') AS DATE  FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS DV_COST_ROLLUP_DT
/* End of code change */
FROM
(
SELECT
ORG_CODE,
ITEM_NUMBER,
SO_NUMBER,
SO_LINE_NUMBER,
CREATION_DATE,
PO_NUMBER,
BOM_ITEM_QUANTITY,
FLB_COST,
ITEM_TYPE,
ITEM_REVISION,
TRANSMISSION_DATE,
PLANNING_CODE,
BOM_REF_ID,
MESSAGE_BOM_PACK_ID,
COALESCE(BOM_PARENT_REF_ID,'-1') BOM_PARENT_REF_ID,
BOM_PROCESS_STATUS,
PROCESS_STATUS,
DF_FEE_COST ,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
ATTRIBUTE6    /* :pvenketa added this column as part of Q3FY15 by SC-LSS */    
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_CG1_XXSCM_MK_AS_BILT_BOM

UNION ALL

SELECT
ORG_CODE,
ITEM_NUMBER,
SO_NUMBER,
SO_LINE_NUMBER,
CREATION_DATE,
PO_NUMBER,
BOM_ITEM_QUANTITY,
FLB_COST,
ITEM_TYPE,
ITEM_REVISION,
TRANSMISSION_DATE,
PLANNING_CODE,
BOM_REF_ID,
MESSAGE_BOM_PACK_ID ,
COALESCE(BOM_PARENT_REF_ID,'-1') BOM_PARENT_REF_ID,
BOM_PROCESS_STATUS,
PROCESS_STATUS,
DF_FEE_COST ,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
ATTRIBUTE6    /* :pvenketa added this column as part of Q3FY15 by SC-LSS */
FROM
$$EXCEPDB.EX_AS_BUILT_BOM_PRODUCT_LINK WHERE EXCEPTION_TYPE='RI'
) SBOM
INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG  NCIO
                ON  SBOM.ORG_CODE=NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_CODE              
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_INVENTORY_ITEM NIIT
                ON SBOM.ITEM_NUMBER = NIIT.BK_PRODUCT_ID
                AND NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY = NIIT.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY
INNER JOIN (  SELECT BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT,PRODUCT_KEY,SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE
FROM  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE  
WHERE (BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT,SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE) IN
(  SELECT BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT,MIN(SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY) SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE
                FROM  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE  
                WHERE MAJOR_LINE_TYPE    ='MAJOR' 
                 AND ITEM_TYPE_CODE  IN ('STANDARD','MODEL')   
/******* Change as impacted with Optional flag in NSOL ****/
                GROUP BY BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT,BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE)) NSOL
                ON NSOL.BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT=SBOM.SO_LINE_NUMBER
                AND CAST(NSOL.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT AS BIGINT )=CAST(SBOM.SO_NUMBER AS BIGINT)
				AND NSOL.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE=NCIO.BK_INVENTORY_ORG_NAME_CODE
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AS_BUILT_BOM_PRODUCT_LINK SM
		ON SM.PRODUCT_KEY  = NSOL.PRODUCT_KEY
                AND SM.CONSTITUENT_PART_KEY = NIIT.ITEM_KEY
                AND SM.EP_MESSAGE_BOM_PACK_ID = SBOM.MESSAGE_BOM_PACK_ID
                AND SM.EP_BOM_REF_ID  = SBOM.BOM_REF_ID
                AND SM.EP_BOM_PARENT_REF_ID  = SBOM.BOM_PARENT_REF_ID
                AND SM.SRC_RPRTD_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM = SBOM.PO_NUMBER   
LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT MESSAGE_BOM_PACK_ID, MIN(CARTON_ID) CARTON_ID, PARENT_CARTON_ID 
                FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXSCM_MK_CARTON
                WHERE PARENT_CARTON_ID IS NULL
                GROUP BY MESSAGE_BOM_PACK_ID, PARENT_CARTON_ID) ELC
                ON SBOM.MESSAGE_BOM_PACK_ID=ELC.MESSAGE_BOM_PACK_ID
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM , MIN( PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY) PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY
                                FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER 
                                WHERE SS_CD ='CG'
                                GROUP BY BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM  ) NPO
                ON SBOM.PO_NUMBER = NPO.BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM
LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_AS_BUILT_RLLUP_COST  WRUC
				ON WRUC.BOM_REF_ID= SBOM.BOM_REF_ID
				AND COALESCE(WRUC.BOM_PARENT_REF_ID,'-1')=SBOM.BOM_PARENT_REF_ID
				AND WRUC.MESSAGE_BOM_PACK_ID=SBOM.MESSAGE_BOM_PACK_ID
				AND WRUC.PO_NUMBER =SBOM.PO_NUMBER
				AND WRUC.ITEM_NUMBER =   SBOM.ITEM_NUMBER
/*LEFT JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_AS_BUILT_BOM_PRODUCT_LINK NABBPL 
                ON  NABBPL.PRODUCT_KEY  = NSOL.PRODUCT_KEY
                AND NABBPL.CONSTITUENT_PART_KEY = NIIT.ITEM_KEY
                AND NABBPL.EP_MESSAGE_BOM_PACK_ID    = SBOM.MESSAGE_BOM_PACK_ID
                AND NABBPL.EP_BOM_REF_ID  = SBOM.BOM_REF_ID
                AND NABBPL.EP_BOM_PARENT_REF_ID  = SBOM.BOM_PARENT_REF_ID
                AND NABBPL.SRC_RPRTD_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM = SBOM.PO_NUMBER*/

QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY SM.AS_BUILT_BOM_PRODUCT_LINK_KEY
ORDER BY LAST_UPDATE_DATE DESC )  =1

SELECT  RANK () OVER (ORDER BY SXMABBI.BOM_REF_ID, SXMABBI.MESSAGE_BOM_PACK_ID,SXMABBI.BOM_PARENT_REF_ID,SXMABBI.PRODUCT_KEY,SXMABBI.CONSTITUENT_PART_KEY,
SXMABBI.PO_NUMBER)+ MAX_VAL AS AS_BUILT_BOM_PRODUCT_LINK_KEY,
SXMABBI.PRODUCT_KEY,
SXMABBI.CONSTITUENT_PART_KEY,
SXMABBI.MESSAGE_BOM_PACK_ID,
SXMABBI.BOM_REF_ID,
SXMABBI.BOM_PARENT_REF_ID,
SXMABBI.PO_NUMBER
FROM  
(SELECT COALESCE (MAX (AS_BUILT_BOM_PRODUCT_LINK_KEY), 0) MAX_VAL  FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_AS_BUILT_BOM_PRODUCT_LINK) SABBPL,
(
SELECT 
COALESCE(NSOL.PRODUCT_KEY ,-997) AS PRODUCT_KEY,
COALESCE(NIIT.ITEM_KEY ,-997)  AS CONSTITUENT_PART_KEY,
SBOM.BOM_REF_ID,
SBOM.MESSAGE_BOM_PACK_ID,
COALESCE(SBOM.BOM_PARENT_REF_ID,'-1') BOM_PARENT_REF_ID,
SBOM.SO_LINE_NUMBER,
SBOM.SO_NUMBER,
SBOM.ORG_CODE,
SBOM.ITEM_NUMBER,
SBOM.PO_NUMBER,
SBOM.ITEM_TYPE 
FROM 
(
SELECT BOM_REF_ID,MESSAGE_BOM_PACK_ID,COALESCE(BOM_PARENT_REF_ID,'-1') BOM_PARENT_REF_ID,ORG_CODE,ITEM_NUMBER,PO_NUMBER,ITEM_TYPE,SO_LINE_NUMBER,SO_NUMBER FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_XXSCM_MK_AS_BILT_BOM 
UNION 
SELECT BOM_REF_ID,MESSAGE_BOM_PACK_ID,COALESCE(BOM_PARENT_REF_ID,'-1') BOM_PARENT_REF_ID,ORG_CODE,ITEM_NUMBER,PO_NUMBER,ITEM_TYPE,SO_LINE_NUMBER,SO_NUMBER FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_AS_BUILT_BOM_PRODUCT_LINK
 ) SBOM
INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG  NCIO
               ON SBOM.ORG_CODE=NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_CODE
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_INVENTORY_ITEM NIIT
               ON SBOM.ITEM_NUMBER = NIIT.BK_PRODUCT_ID
               AND NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY = NIIT.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY         
INNER JOIN (  SELECT BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT,PRODUCT_KEY  , MIN(SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY) SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE
                FROM  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE  
                WHERE MAJOR_LINE_TYPE    ='MAJOR' 
                 AND ITEM_TYPE_CODE  IN ('STANDARD','MODEL')
                GROUP BY BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT,PRODUCT_KEY,BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE) NSOL
                ON NSOL.BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT=SBOM.SO_LINE_NUMBER
                AND CAST (NSOL.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT AS BIGINT )=CAST(SBOM.SO_NUMBER AS BIGINT)
				AND NSOL.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE=NCIO.BK_INVENTORY_ORG_NAME_CODE
) SXMABBI
WHERE NOT EXISTS (      SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_AS_BUILT_BOM_PRODUCT_LINK SAS
               WHERE SAS.PRODUCT_KEY  = SXMABBI.PRODUCT_KEY
               AND SAS.CONSTITUENT_PART_KEY = SXMABBI.CONSTITUENT_PART_KEY
               AND SAS.EP_MESSAGE_BOM_PACK_ID = SXMABBI.MESSAGE_BOM_PACK_ID
               AND SAS.EP_BOM_REF_ID  = SXMABBI.BOM_REF_ID
               AND SAS.EP_BOM_PARENT_REF_ID  = SXMABBI.BOM_PARENT_REF_ID
               AND SAS.SRC_RPRTD_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM = SXMABBI.PO_NUMBER)
attributes.Pre SQL:
DELETE FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_AS_BUILT_BOM_PRODUCT_LINK ALL;
/*DELETE FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_AS_BUILT_BOM_PRODUCT_LINK
WHERE (MESSAGE_BOM_PACK_ID,BOM_REF_ID,COALESCE(BOM_PARENT_REF_ID,'-1'),PO_NUMBER,ITEM_NUMBER) IN 
( SELECT MESSAGE_BOM_PACK_ID,BOM_REF_ID,COALESCE(BOM_PARENT_REF_ID,'-1'),PO_NUMBER,ITEM_NUMBER  FROM  $$STGDB.ST_CG1_XXSCM_MK_AS_BILT_BOM
UNION ALL
SELECT  EP_MESSAGE_BOM_PACK_ID , EP_BOM_REF_ID, EP_BOM_PARENT_REF_ID,
SRC_RPRTD_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM, NIIT.BK_PRODUCT_ID 
FROM $$WORKDB.W_AS_BUILT_BOM_PRODUCT_LINK WABPL
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_INVENTORY_ITEM NIIT
	ON NIIT.ITEM_KEY=WABPL.CONSTITUENT_PART_KEY
	AND NIIT.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY=WABPL.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_KEY
WHERE PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY <> -99995
AND  SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY <> -7777
);*/

-- delete the duplicates due to source issue
DELETE   FROM   STGDB.ST_CG1_XXSCM_MK_AS_BILT_BOM 
WHERE ( BOM_REF_ID,MESSAGE_BOM_PACK_ID, BOM_PARENT_REF_ID,ITEM_NUMBER,PO_NUMBER,SO_LINE_NUMBER,SO_NUMBER) IN 
( SELECT BOM_REF_ID,MESSAGE_BOM_PACK_ID,COALESCE(BOM_PARENT_REF_ID,'-1') BOM_PARENT_REF_ID,ITEM_NUMBER,PO_NUMBER,SO_LINE_NUMBER,SO_NUMBER 
FROM STGDB.ST_CG1_XXSCM_MK_AS_BILT_BOM 
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6,7 HAVING COUNT(*) > 1)
AND ITEM_TYPE IS NULL;    


DELETE FROM   STGDB.ST_CG1_XXSCM_MK_AS_BILT_BOM 
WHERE ( BOM_REF_ID,MESSAGE_BOM_PACK_ID, BOM_PARENT_REF_ID,ITEM_NUMBER,PO_NUMBER,SO_LINE_NUMBER,SO_NUMBER) IN 
( SELECT BOM_REF_ID,MESSAGE_BOM_PACK_ID,COALESCE(BOM_PARENT_REF_ID,'-1') BOM_PARENT_REF_ID,ITEM_NUMBER,PO_NUMBER,SO_LINE_NUMBER,SO_NUMBER FROM STGDB.ST_CG1_XXSCM_MK_AS_BILT_BOM 
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6,7 HAVING COUNT(*) > 1)
AND ITEM_REVISION  = '-A0';

 
DELETE FROM $$WORKDB.W_AS_BUILT_BOM_PRODUCT_LINK ALL;
CALL COLLECT_STATS_WRAP ('$$EXCEPDB','EX_AS_BUILT_BOM_PRODUCT_LINK','D');

CALL COLLECT_STATS_WRAP ('$$STGDB','ST_CG1_XXSCM_MK_AS_BILT_BOM','D');
